other.gamesetcuzoomplus.zoom.multiplierdsc: Multiplies the default view. Values below 1.0 zoom in; values above 1.0 zoom out.
other.gamesetcuzoomplus.zoom.factordsc: Zooming in multiplies the view scale by this value; zooming out divides by it. (proportional zoom)
other.gamesetcuzoomplus.zoom.smoothdsc: Applying zoom with smooth animation instead of applying them immediately.
